rationale: Documentation hub creation; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Adding a support section to docs landing page; pure documentation task.
Poor error message for find with empty sort key; API ergonomics, no spec rule violated.
DBRef decoding gap in DocumentCodec; internal codec asymmetry, not a named BSON spec rule violation.
Zero message size in ConnectionListener event; implementation bug in monitoring internals, no spec rule cited.
Filters.not produces wrong query for nested Filters.and; query builder bug, not a CRUD spec nonconformance.
Adding API docs to navigation menu; pure documentation task.
Installation guide clarification for non-uber jar dependencies; pure documentation.
Intermittent test race condition in smoke test with mongos load balancing; CI/test flakiness, not spec behavior.
Missing getStats() equivalent in 3.0 MongoDatabase; API feature gap, no spec defines this method.
JsonReader fails to parse ISODate strings in $date; Extended JSON parsing issue, no explicit spec rule cited.
Query failure with BasicDBObject from PersistentArrayMap; codec/mapping regression, not a spec violation.
DocumentCodec fails to serialize embedded Set; Java-specific codec limitation, no spec rule violated.
Server selection spec requires sending commands to directly-connected servers regardless of read pref; driver refused.
CRUD spec requires distinct() to have a required filter parameter; driver omitted it.
Reference documentation for sort builder; pure documentation task.
Reference documentation for projection builder; pure documentation task.
Adding Google search to docs; pure documentation/UI task.
Socket returned to pool in undefined state on Error subclass; internal resource management bug, no spec rule violated.
Document that eval is deprecated; pure documentation task.
ObjectId.compareTo() uses signed comparison instead of unsigned; Java-specific regression, no BSON spec rule for comparison order.
ObjectId.toHexString is slow due to String.format; performance improvement, no spec violation.
ISODate parser uses 12-hour format instead of 24-hour; JSON parsing bug, no explicit BSON spec rule cited for format.
updateUser command fails against 3.x server due to server selection sending to non-primary; server version compatibility issue.
Missing JMX monitoring properties in documentation; pure documentation task.
JsonReader surrogate pair parsing moves position by one instead of two; JSON parsing bug, no spec rule violated.
addUser fails on pre-2.6 sharded clusters due to missing _id; legacy compatibility bug, not a spec violation.
Javadoc clarification that MongoClientOptions.Builder is not thread-safe; pure documentation task.
Commands fail against REPLICA_SET_GHOST server when replica set param is configured; unclear if specific SDAM rule violated.
Driver should reject empty update document per CRUD spec; empty update is treated as replacement, driver must error.
NPE in MongoClient.close() when cursorFinalizerEnabled is false; null check implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Profile status command fails against secondary; server selection in single-connection mode, unclear if spec rule precisely violated.
SDAM spec requires using electionId to avoid false primaries; driver not using it, spec commit cited explicitly.
GridFS createFile regression closes stream before use; implementation bug introduced in 3.0.1, not a GridFS spec nonconformance.
Improving async MongoIterable API usability; internal API ergonomics improvement, no spec involvement.
Race condition with repeated auth failure attempts; non-deterministic internal state bug, no spec rule cited.
NPE when server sends command response without ok/errmsg fields; defensive error handling, no spec rule the driver violated.
SDAM spec commit cited specifying removal of members whose 'me' hostname mismatches; driver didn't implement this rule.
Cluster manager fails equality check for DBAddress subclass; Java-specific subclass equality bug, no SDAM spec rule precisely violated.
Extra reference count decrement in async batch cursor under concurrency; race condition/internal bug, no cursor spec rule violated.
Updating FindBugs exclusion configuration; build tooling change, no spec involvement.
FindOperationIterable.batchSize calls itself infinitely; internal code defect, no spec behavior involved.
Documentation for OSGi support limitations; pure documentation task.
Add out.* sharded option to MapReduceCommand; feature addition, no spec nonconformance.
Server selection spec says obedient commands follow read preference; driver incorrectly forces primary for listCollections/listIndexes.
Filters.and/or with empty clause list behavior; API ergonomics improvement, no CRUD spec rule on empty clause handling.
Cursor not closed in finally block on exception; resource management bug, no cursor spec rule violated.
GeometryCollection type parameter unbounded; Java generics API issue, no spec involvement.
NPE in DBCursor.getCursorId when server doesn't create a cursor; null check implementation bug, not a cursor spec violation.
Driver kills cursor twice when limit reached on first batch; implementation regression, no cursor spec rule precisely violated.
